title: Datadog (DDOG) Earnings Date and Reports 2026
text: Datadog Earnings Calendar and Historical Performance. Q1 2026 Results: Datadog reported Q1 2026 revenue of 1.01 billion up 32 percent year-over-year with earnings per share of 0.60 exceeding analyst expectations. Company ARR: Annual Recurring Revenue surpassed 4 billion marking another major milestone for the company. Customer Base: Datadog expanded to approximately 33,200 customers with strong growth in high-value accounts. Recent History: The company has consistently beaten earnings expectations and raised guidance indicating strong operational execution. Product Portfolio: Datadog offers a comprehensive platform including infrastructure monitoring log management application performance monitoring and security solutions. Market Position: Datadog is a leading provider of cloud monitoring and observability solutions with a diverse customer base spanning enterprises and smaller organizations. Analyst Coverage: Over 45 analysts cover DDOG with a consensus Strong Buy rating and average price target of 216.35. Growth Drivers: Key growth drivers include platform adoption expansion into new markets and demand for AI infrastructure monitoring solutions.
